  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Fibre Maintenance Supervisor",
  "description": "ipNX is one of Nigeria&rsquo;s fastest growing Information and Communications Technology companies, serving a multitude of needs across enterprises, small businesses and residents with innovative, world-class services.

Our ability to identify, satisfy and exceed today&rsquo;s market needs is a testament to over a decade of experience, our commitment, drive and passion realized through highly skilled and well seasoned professionals.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Fibre Maintenance Supervisor

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The Outside Plant (OSP) Supervisor oversees maintenance of ipNX fiber optic &amp; civil work activities on the outside plant network.
	The OSP Supervisor will be involved in the day -to- day maintenance and management of the outside plant, taking into consideration customer and Local authority organizations in the maintenance of the fiber outside plant.
	The role is expected to involve a significant element of on -site attendance.


Responsibilities


	Corporate Customers: Restore service failures within 3hours of its occurrence Implementation and integration of new projects and ensure all open incident tickets are closed within this timeframe.
	Retail Customers: Restore service failures within 12 hours of its occurrence.
	Incident Management Communication: Provide prompt feedback for input into the OTRS application with information relating to activities being carried out to resolve customer service incidents.
	Proactively identify, plan and execute preventive maintenance action on the fibre network.
	Audit and collate information for the fiber outside plant network. Prepare the as maintained documents within region/sub-region managed for the O &amp;M Unit.
	Ensure weekly support status reports are done and submitted timely for review
	Activate FOS Customer requests within 3 days of sign up.Sign-off the Customer Feedback Form, prepare and submit post-activation report.


Qualifications / Experience


	University Degree in Telecoms, Engineering or Applied Sciences.
	At least 2 years in telecommunications industry, with experience in Fiber network deployments. and outside plant maintenance.
	Experience in civil works supervision &amp; quality control.
	Experience in processing ROW License with Local Authorities/State Regulatory Agencies.
	User experience for Microsoft Office Tools including a good working knowledge of Microsoft Project.
	User experience for Visio/AutoCAD/GIS tools is desired.
	Excellent communication skills.
	Ability to solve complex problems in the shortest available time using honed analytical skills.
	Good interpersonal skills with customers, vendors, team members and local community
	Proven track records of maintenance and management of metro and/or long-distance fibre optic infrastructure.
	Sound knowledge of telecom industry best practices, norms and technical requirements with regard to fibre &amp; civil work maintenance.
	FTTx and/or P2P fibre deployment and maintenance experience are distinct advantages i.e. fibre termination using fusion splice machines, testing &amp; analyzing fibre links with OTDR and Light Source/Power Meters (LSPM), identifying fibre cores with VFLs.
	Capable of understanding fibre network architectures, designs &amp; splice plans.
	An inherent culture of documenting concise and accurate &ldquo;As-Is&rdquo; status of network&nbsp;elements and splice configuration, in a consistent manner.
	Familiarity with the requirements of Health &amp; Safety legislation in Nigeria.


Salary
N500,000 / month.

Fibre Maintenance Supervisor Job at ipNX Nigeria Limited




        
    

        
        ipNX is one of Nigeria’s fastest growing Information and Communications Technology companies, serving a multitude of needs across enterprises, small businesses and residents with innovative, world-class services.

Our ability to identify, satisfy and exceed today’s market needs is a testament to over a decade of experience, our commitment, drive and passion realized through highly skilled and well seasoned professionals.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Fibre Maintenance Supervisor

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The Outside Plant (OSP) Supervisor oversees maintenance of ipNX fiber optic & civil work activities on the outside plant network.
	The OSP Supervisor will be involved in the day -to- day maintenance and management of the outside plant, taking into consideration customer and Local authority organizations in the maintenance of the fiber outside plant.
	The role is expected to involve a significant element of on -site attendance.


Responsibilities


	Corporate Customers: Restore service failures within 3hours of its occurrence Implementation and integration of new projects and ensure all open incident tickets are closed within this timeframe.
	Retail Customers: Restore service failures within 12 hours of its occurrence.
	Incident Management Communication: Provide prompt feedback for input into the OTRS application with information relating to activities being carried out to resolve customer service incidents.
	Proactively identify, plan and execute preventive maintenance action on the fibre network.
	Audit and collate information for the fiber outside plant network. Prepare the as maintained documents within region/sub-region managed for the O &M Unit.
	Ensure weekly support status reports are done and submitted timely for review
	Activate FOS Customer requests within 3 days of sign up.Sign-off the Customer Feedback Form, prepare and submit post-activation report.


Qualifications / Experience


	University Degree in Telecoms, Engineering or Applied Sciences.
	At least 2 years in telecommunications industry, with experience in Fiber network deployments. and outside plant maintenance.
	Experience in civil works supervision & quality control.
	Experience in processing ROW License with Local Authorities/State Regulatory Agencies.
	User experience for Microsoft Office Tools including a good working knowledge of Microsoft Project.
	User experience for Visio/AutoCAD/GIS tools is desired.
	Excellent communication skills.
	Ability to solve complex problems in the shortest available time using honed analytical skills.
	Good interpersonal skills with customers, vendors, team members and local community
	Proven track records of maintenance and management of metro and/or long-distance fibre optic infrastructure.
	Sound knowledge of telecom industry best practices, norms and technical requirements with regard to fibre & civil work maintenance.
	FTTx and/or P2P fibre deployment and maintenance experience are distinct advantages i.e. fibre termination using fusion splice machines, testing & analyzing fibre links with OTDR and Light Source/Power Meters (LSPM), identifying fibre cores with VFLs.
	Capable of understanding fibre network architectures, designs & splice plans.
	An inherent culture of documenting concise and accurate “As-Is” status of network elements and splice configuration, in a consistent manner.
	Familiarity with the requirements of Health & Safety legislation in Nigeria.


Salary
N500,000 / month.

Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

	The Client Success &amp; Growth Manager is responsible for managing high-value client relationships, driving revenue growth, and delivering an exceptional client experience.

What We Offer


	Competitive salary with performance-based incentives

	Career growth and professional development opportunities
	A collaborative and supportive work environment


Method of Application&nbsp;

  "title": "Product Marketing / Brand Manager",
  "description": "DTECH Centrix Plus Limited - Our client,&nbsp;Pathfinder Consulting is a leading education and career consultancy committed to helping students and professionals reach their goals.

They are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Product Marketing / Brand Manager

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos (Remote)
Employment Type: Full-time&nbsp;

Job Summary


	As we prepare for the official launch of the Pathfinder App&mdash;our innovative career and job-search platform&mdash;we are looking for a Product Marketing Manager with strong creative, analytical, and strategic capabilities to drive product growth and brand visibility across Africa and the diaspora.
	This role is central to shaping how users experience and adopt the Pathfinder App.
	You will develop and execute product marketing strategies, lead launch campaigns, build compelling visual and written messaging, and collaborate across teams to ensure a successful market introduction.
	You will also oversee brand consistency, app-focused creative assets, and performance-driven content that drives user acquisition, engagement, and retention.


Key Responsibilities
Product Launch &amp; Go-to-Market Strategy:


	Lead the end-to-end launch of the Pathfinder App, overseeing positioning, messaging, user communication, and promotional rollouts.
	Develop multi-channel campaigns (social, email, content, ads, influencers) to drive awareness, sign-ups, and activation.
	Create launch decks, user guides, onboarding scripts, promo videos, and app store creatives.


Brand Positioning &amp; Creative Direction:


	Establish and maintain a consistent brand identity across all app marketing materials.
	Oversee the creation of visuals, app screens, landing pages, graphics, animations, and short-form promotional videos.
	Build brand systems, templates, and style guides that internal teams and partners can use.


Content &amp; Messaging Development:


	Craft clear, persuasive product messaging that communicates the app&rsquo;s value propositions to students, job seekers, and professionals.
	Produce copy for ads, social campaigns, push notifications, blogs, email sequences, and the app onboarding journey.
	Translate app features and technical details into relatable, benefit-driven communication.


Creative Asset Development:


	Lead the design and production of marketing collateral:
	brochures, pitch decks, video creatives, app promotion kits, social ads, influencer toolkits, etc.
	Use design and video editing skills to create high-performing visual assets across platforms.


Market, User &amp; Competitor Research:


	Conduct research on target users, competitor apps, industry trends, and emerging content/design patterns.
	Apply insights to refine product messaging, app features, and campaign strategies.
	Provide monthly reports on user behavior patterns and app market trends.


Performance Marketing Collaboration:


	Work with the Digital Marketing team to run performance-driven app campaigns on Meta, TikTok, and Google.
	Manage A/B tests for creatives, messaging, and user flows to improve acquisition, engagement, and retention.
	Analyze app metrics such as activation rate, user drop-off, session time, feature usage, and funnel performance.


Cross-Functional Collaboration:


	Work closely with Product Development on feature roll-outs, user onboarding, and in-app communication strategies.
	Collaborate with the Sales, Digital Marketing, and Creative teams to ensure aligned messaging and consistent execution.
	Coordinate with freelancers (designers, videographers, etc.) to deliver high-quality creative outputs.


Qualifications &amp; Skills


	Bachelor&rsquo;s degree in Marketing, Business, Communications, or related field (MBA is an advantage).
	Proven experience as a Product Marketing Manager or similar role, ideally within tech, apps, or digital products.
	Strong background in brand management, graphics design, and content creation.
	Proficiency in design tools (Adobe suite, Canva, Figma) and video editing software.
	Experience launching apps or leading major product campaigns is a strong plus.
	Skilled in developing go-to-market plans, product positioning, and high-converting creatives.
	Strong understanding of user behavior, data analytics, and performance marketing.
	Excellent communication and storytelling abilities&mdash;both written and visual.
	Ability to work effectively across teams and manage multiple fast-moving projects.


What Success Looks Like


	Strong market awareness and successful app launch milestones.
	Consistent and compelling brand identity across all platforms.
	High-performing creatives resulting in increased app sign-ups, engagement, and retention.
	App funnel improvements driven by data insights and optimized messaging.
	Timely delivery of marketing campaigns, launch materials, and creative assets.
	Growth in user acquisition, brand visibility, and community engagement.


Salary
N300,000 - N350,000 monthly.&nbsp;

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV / Resume and cover letter &nbsp;to:&nbsp;hr@pathfinderconsulting.com&nbsp;using &quot;Product Marketing Manager &ndash; [Your Name]&quot;&nbsp;as the&nbsp;subject of the mail.

	Analyse the tax aspects of any agreements made by the company with third parties and advise managers accordingly.

	2-5 years of progressive experience in tax advisory and compliance.
	Highly preferred certification from ICAN (Institute of Chartered Accountants of Nigeria), ACCA, or CITN (Chartered Institute of Taxation of Nigeria).

	Revenue Management
	Accounting Policies and Transactions
	Tax Management
	Customer Centricity
	Risk Management
	Change Management
	People Leadership
	Enterprenurship
	Organizational Learning.

        Ikeja Electricity Distribution Company (IKEDC) is one of the largest power distribution companies in Nigeria, committed to delivering reliable and efficient electricity services to our customers. With a strong focus on innovation and sustainability, we aim to transform the energy landscape in Nigeria and contribute to the country's economic development. Our mission is to provide exceptional service while ensuring the safety and well-being of our employees and customers.

	Carry out any other duty as requested by the Unit Head or Head of Department.

	Bachelor’s degree or it's equivalent in Accounting, Finance, Economics, or related numerate disciplines

With a focus on customer-centric experiences and a strategy combining innovative and traditional business models, Wagon Wheel Ltd ensures peace of mind for its clients. The company is committed to enhancing stakeholder value while providing the finest luxury real estate experience.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Civil Engineer

Job Location:&nbsp;Utako, Abuja (FCT)&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time

Description


	The Civil Engineer will be responsible for planning, designing, supervising, and executing construction and infrastructure projects.
	The role requires ensuring that projects are completed on time, within budget, and in compliance with relevant standards and regulations while maintaining high-quality workmanship.


Key Responsibilities
Project Planning &amp; Design:


	Develop detailed designs, drawings, and specifications for construction projects
	Conduct feasibility studies, site investigations, and risk assessments
	Interpret architectural and structural drawings.


Project Execution &amp; Supervision:


	Oversee construction activities on-site to ensure compliance with project specifications
	Monitor project progress and prepare regular reports
	Coordinate with contractors, subcontractors, and other stakeholders
	Ensure adherence to timelines and project milestones.


Quality Control &amp; Compliance:


	Ensure all work meets industry standards, safety regulations, and company policies
	Conduct site inspections and resolve technical issues
	Review materials and workmanship for quality assurance.


Cost Management:


	Assist in preparing project budgets and cost estimates
	Monitor expenses and ensure cost-effective project execution
	Collaborate with Quantity Surveyors on cost control and valuations


Health, Safety &amp; Environment (HSE):


	Enforce safety standards and ensure a safe working environment
	Identify potential hazards and implement corrective measures.


Requirements &amp; Qualifications


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Civil Engineering or related fields
	2 - 5 years of relevant experience (adjust based on level)
	Professional certification (e.g., COREN) is an added advantage
	Strong knowledge of construction methods, materials, and regulations
	Proficiency in engineering software (e.g., AutoCAD, Civil 3D, etc.)
	Good project management and problem-solving skills
	Excellent communication and teamwork abilities.


Key Skills &amp; Competencies:


	Attention to detail
	Analytical and critical thinking
	Time management and organizational skills
	Leadership and team coordination
	Ability to work under pressure and meet deadlines.


What We Offer


	Competitive salary and benefits
	Opportunity to work on diverse and impactful projects
	Professional development and growth opportunities
	Collaborative and supportive work environment.


Method of Application&nbsp;
